subcodes.first_line: O ye twin luminaries of the assemblage of Bahá'ís! Your joint letter was received, wherein an important matter was detailed, and it concerned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شمع جمع بهائیان نامه مشترک رسید و در هر دو یک مسئله مهمی مرقوم بود و آن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers
